section_title: SYNTHETIC M4-T004 FH-2 conflict-detection demonstration (NOT an official capture)

source.verification_required: SYNTHETIC - NOT captured from any official source. Exists only to exercise the M4-T004 FH-2 fail-closed same-family rule-conflict detector. Values are illustrative and must never be used as a legal statement; a real rule requires official capture + G6 approval.

verbatim_excerpt: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): for M4-T004 FH-2 conflict-detection demonstrations only - same-family, same-applicability rules with overlapping effective windows and overlapping outputs. Illustrative values; never a legal statement.
notes: M4-T004 fixture for FH-2 same-family rule-conflict detection (positive + negative controls).
